_comment: SCARLETT GUARDRAIL — RPG SHARED DRIVE ONLY.
guardrail_notes: THIS RULE APPLIES TO SCARLETT ONLY.
NEVER write to manus_google_drive: root without the drive-root-folder-id flag.
ALWAYS use --drive-root-folder-id 0AK8dAs_XgfnNUk9PVA with every rclone command.
ALWAYS use driveId: 0AK8dAs_XgfnNUk9PVA with every gws command.
ALL inputs (context, knowledge, protocols) come FROM this shared drive.
ALL outputs (reports, newsletters, client deliverables) go TO this shared drive.
NEVER permanently delete files. Always move to trash.
